page: Microsoft Azure DC32ads_v5 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCADSv5 server family. It is powered by an AMD processor utilizing the x86_64 CPU architecture. The instance features 32 dedicated vCPUs and 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. Virtualization is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server type includes 1229 GB of local storage and is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance disk attachments. It does not include any integrated GPUs, making it a CPU-only compute resource. Additionally, the instance is provisioned with zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the DC32ads_v5 offers a balanced resource density suitable for general-purpose workloads that require dedicated CPU allocation and local storage without the overhead of GPU hardware. The combination of 32 dedicated vCPUs, a 1:4 memory-to-core ratio, and substantial local storage makes this instance type appropriate for relational databases, enterprise applications, web serving, and general-purpose business workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure DC32ads_v5 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the DCADSv5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and 128.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core ratio. The instance is equipped with 1229 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations, though it lacks integrated GPU hardware and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile delivers a balanced resource density, making it qualitatively cost-effective for workloads requiring dedicated CPU performance and local storage. The DC32ads_v5 is suited for general-purpose applications, enterprise web serving, and database management systems.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC32ads_v5 is a DCADSv5 virtual machine featuring 32 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 128.0 GB of RAM, and 1229 GB of local storage, designed for general-purpose and database workloads.

tagline: A dedicated AMD-powered virtual machine offering balanced compute, memory, and local storage for enterprise workloads.
